narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: lets get on with a full nuke war…wipe us all out …at least it (for most) will be over quickly
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The quote explicitly predicts and highlights a catastrophic, world-ending negative consequence for Western countries, framing nuclear war as an almost desirable outcome due to the perceived failures of the West.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Will they resort to nuclear weapons to even out the war?
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This question, posed in the introductory text, directly evokes fear and anxiety about the potential for nuclear escalation, which is a core element of amplifying war-related fears.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Sadly the western media is framing the war as if Russia is losing which only prolongs negotiations and causes more death.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement directly questions the reliability and motives of Western media, accusing it of harmful propaganda that prolongs the conflict, fitting the narrative of distrust towards media.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: The question is, why the desperation to keep the war going?
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This question, in the context of the text which frames Russia as winning, implies that Ukraine and/or its Western backers are irrationally and desperately prolonging a lost war, undermining their actions and intentions.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: amerikans are the greatest pigs on the planet…and that is in the most derogitive term you can imagine.. absolute pigs

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: lets get on with a full nuke war…wipe us all out …at least it (for most) will be over quickly

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Blaming the war on others rather than the invader
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: the western media is framing the war as if Russia is losing which only prolongs negotiations and causes more death. The question is, why the desperation to keep the war going?
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This shifts the blame for the continuation of the war and the resulting death away from Russia (the invader) and onto Western media and, by implication, Western actors who are portrayed as desperate to prolong the conflict.
